sourceRecord.interpretation: The user accepted the immediately preceding explicit recommendation to select Das Zimmer.

reason: It has the strongest versioned and reproducible candidate material.
The house ensemble provides a repeatable series engine.
Its production scope is visible and planable without reconstructing a missing source.
Der Solidarpreis remains preserved as an unselected candidate with a missing original source.

approved: the selected ensemble and location direction at pilot-planning level
use of existing Das Zimmer material as the starting candidate package for further audit
notAutomaticallyApproved: the four character bibles as final locked canon
the 45.5-second timing as immutable final timing
production readiness or a finished episode

unselectedCandidate.retentionRule: Preserve sources and references. Do not delete or silently merge into the selected pilot.
unselectedCandidate.sourceBoundary: The original source remains missing from the current repository.
